steps.title: Attach the song title
steps.content: The quoted title identifies the specific hit song. Because the title is essential to the noun phrase, it should follow the noun directly without punctuation.

steps.title: Reject separating punctuation
steps.content: Choice A uses a colon as if introducing a separate element. Choice B sets off an essential title with a comma. Choice C uses a semicolon, which requires independent clauses. The answer is D.
